title: Big Globe Optimized [FORGE/NEOFORGE]
description: Big Globe Optimized to make more light and fast as normal
body:
**_Alternative CurseForge Download_** [**_[Forge]_**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/big-globe-optimized-forge) **_/_** [**_[Fabric]_**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/big-globe-optimized-fabric)

[**Big Globe Optimized FABRIC**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/big-globe-optimized-fabric)

⚙️ [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe) Optimized is a performance-tuned template for Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, built to run with significantly fewer resources than the default setup. 💡 While it doesn't perform miracles, this modpack helps stabilize performance on both the client and server sides, especially in high-load environments.

- Enhanced Stability: Fine-tuned to minimize CPU strain and stabilize TPS (ticks per second), ensuring a smoother, lag-free experience.
- Resource-Efficient: Designed to run efficiently on a wide range of systems, using fewer resources than the default Big Globe setup.

Key Optimization

The default Big Globe configuration uses 10 threads, which can overload CPUs and impact TPS. We've reduced this to 1 thread for smoother performance with minimal lag. Need faster chunk loading? You can easily adjust the thread count in the config file:
```
"Threads": 1, // Optimized default for minimal lag
```
```
"Threads": 10, // Original Big Globe setting for faster chunk loading
```
Note: Increasing the thread count boosts chunk loading speed but may increase CPU usage and affect TPS. Adjust based on your system's capabilities.

Recommended System Requirements
- Singleplayer: 8GB of RAM or more for a seamless experience.
- Multiplayer: 12GB of RAM or more, depending on the number of players and server demands.

Optional Datapacks for Optimize or Customization
